title: Ukrainian drones deliver robots directly into battle by sea and air
summary: On July 19, a Russian military Telegram channel posted a video showing a Ukrainian hexacopter drone carrying a ground robot suspended below by a cable, according to the Ukrainian government-run news platform United24 .
